faculty.name: Faculty of Information Technology
faculty.description: The Faculty of Information Technology offers industry-focused programs in computing, cybersecurity, data science, and international certifications.

courses.name: NCC Education
courses.overview: UK-based NCC qualification designed to prepare students for international degree programs in computing and business.

courses.name: ITPEC
courses.overview: Japanese IT Professional Examination Council certification recognized in Asia.

courses.name: Data Science
courses.overview: Program focused on data analysis, machine learning, and artificial intelligence.

courses.name: Cyber Security
courses.overview: Program focused on network security, ethical hacking, and digital forensics.

courses.name: Computing
courses.overview: Core computing program covering software development, systems, and databases.
